metadata.title: Breeder profile web research - July 15 batch 4
metadata.notes: Public-web research only. Employer, breeder, licensee, agent, and legal-holder roles remain distinct; no external communication was made.

profiles.ownershipType: private family-farm operator with genetics held in affiliated company
profiles.ownershipSummary: Moondarra Blueberries farm manager and breeder; cited rights sit with Mountain Blue High Chill Pty Ltd rather than personally.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Second-generation farm manager with a visible third generation and Mal Deveson in a mentoring role.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Operationally link to Moondarra and preserve Mountain Blue High Chill as rightsholder. Verify ownership and economics between the two groups.

profiles.ownershipType: corporate breeding director in closely held platform
profiles.ownershipSummary: Hortifrut Genetics Rubus breeding leader; Hortifrut entities are the current documented holders.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Global program director supported by an institutional breeding bench.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Hortifrut. Verify territory-by-territory assignment and brand ownership.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Owner and breeder at Ben-Dor Fruits & Nurseries Ltd; company and individual title vary by cultivar.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Fifth-generation family business with son Edo/Ido publicly identified as manager.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Independent family target. Verify ultimate shares, cultivar-level title, foreign licenses, and Edo/Ido spelling.

profiles.ownershipType: retired university breeder and nursery founder
profiles.ownershipSummary: Cornell professor emeritus and Cummins Nursery co-founder; Geneva rights were assigned to Cornell entities, not the family nursery.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Completed institutional succession; son Steve and family continued the separate nursery.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Historical Cornell rollup, not an independent IP owner. Preserve Cummins Nursery as a separate operating nursery.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Driscoll's blackberry breeder; Driscoll's is assignee for the DrisBlack portfolio.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Active member of a team-based corporate program.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Driscoll's; no personal title evidence.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Costa Variety Improvement Manager; cited rights are held by Costa and joint-development entities rather than personally.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Leader of a publicly described 14-person variety-improvement team.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Costa/BluGenix. Verify joint-development shares, trademarks, and territorial licenses.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Driscoll's-affiliated blueberry breeder; Driscoll's is the applicant or owner in cited filings.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Institutional R&D continuity; exact current title requires confirmation.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Driscoll's. Confirm full legal name and current remit.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Driscoll's-affiliated strawberry and blueberry breeder; company entities hold the associated rights.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Institutional team provides continuity; exact title remains unresolved.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Driscoll's; no personal ownership evidence.

profiles.ownershipType: public university and nonprofit research leader
profiles.ownershipSummary: University of Udine genetics professor and IGA scientific director; University and IGA are documented rights holders.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Institutional continuity exists, though no named successor to the scientific-director role was found.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Institutional licensing profile, not an acquisition target.

profiles.ownershipType: retired public-institution breeder now at public university
profiles.ownershipSummary: Kazuyuki Abe is retired from NARO and now a professor; legacy rights remain with NARO.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Move from NARO is a succession transition; institutional structures continue.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public institutional rollup; no personal title evidence.

profiles.ownershipSummary: IRTA apple and pear breeding leader; joint institutional assignees hold HOT81A1 and related rights.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Active institutional leader; no named personal successor found.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Institutional partnership profile. Verify joint-IP percentages, trademark owner, and license territories.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Katsuyuki Suzuki is a retired NARO breeder; NARO or predecessor government entities hold the associated fruit rights.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Large multi-breeder institutional teams provide continuity.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public institutional history; no standalone target.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Completed a Queensland government breeding career in 2018; public entities and named program partners hold the associated rights.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Jodi Neal and Katie O'Connor provide visible program succession.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public-program benchmark. Investigate any separate private entity only if independent food-crop rights are found.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Chukichi Takahashi is an active first-generation peach farmer-breeder and is personally named as breeder and rightsholder.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Still breeding after roughly 60 years with no publicly named successor, creating a strong succession signal.
profiles.webResearchNotes: High-priority succession diligence. Verify direct contact, full active-rights map, agents, and foreign licenses.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Noriyuki Onoue is a NARO fruit-tree breeder; NARO is the holder in cited variety records.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Active researcher within multi-person institutional teams.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public institutional rollup; licensee and foreign-rights mapping remains cultivar-specific.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Driscoll's raspberry breeder; Driscoll's is assignee for the DrisRasp portfolio.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Active recent filings inside a team-based corporate program.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Driscoll's; employee, not a standalone owner.

profiles.ownershipSummary: The abbreviated name cannot be responsibly linked to a unique breeder without crop, denomination, application number, country, or full given name.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Do not assign an employer, portfolio, contact, ownership, acquisition status, or succession signal until the source record supplies a disambiguator.

profiles.ownershipType: public university professor emeritus and breeder
profiles.ownershipSummary: Michael Andrew Walker is a UC Davis professor emeritus; the Regents own and license the associated grape varieties.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Emeritus status is a succession signal, mitigated by institutional ownership and licensing continuity.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public university licensing profile; not an acquisition target.

profiles.ownershipSummary: John Nader Fangary is a Driscoll's blackberry breeder; Driscoll's is assignee.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Recent filings indicate an active team-based program.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Driscoll's; no personal title evidence.

profiles.ownershipType: private-company breeder in joint public-private program
profiles.ownershipSummary: Miyoshi breeder; MYAGMIE-1 is jointly held by Miyoshi and Mie Prefecture.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Recent activity and a multi-breeder team reduce personal succession risk.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Private-company opportunity at Miyoshi level, subject to co-holder diligence.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Hiroshi Iwanami is a current NARO fruit-tree researcher; employment does not establish personal title.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Active 2026 profile and team breeding indicate continuity.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public institutional rollup; verify holder and license status cultivar by cultivar.

profiles.ownershipType: legacy public-institution breeder; current status unresolved
profiles.ownershipSummary: Makoto Uchida made historical NARO breeding contributions; no current employer or personal title was found.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Retirement or current-employment status remains unresolved.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Legacy NARO profile; public-institution licensing only.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Current Driscoll's blackberry breeder; Driscoll's is holder or applicant for the associated DrisBlack lines.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Active 2026 work within a multi-breeder corporate program.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Roll into Driscoll's; no personal ownership evidence.

profiles.ownershipType: public university researcher with prefectural legacy rights
profiles.ownershipSummary: Makoto Ishiguro is now at a public university; Yamagata Prefecture holds the legacy Yamagata C12 rights.
profiles.leadershipSummary: 2024 move is a knowledge-transfer signal; institutional title remains intact.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public institution profile; preserve Yamagata Prefecture as holder.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Hongwen Huang is associated with Lushan and Wuhan Botanical Garden/CAS programs; commercial rights were licensed by institutions, not personally.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Senior but active researcher with moderate transition exposure.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public licensing profile. Confirm current title and territorial licenses.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Nobuhito Mitani is a current NARO fruit-tree researcher; records support breeder status, not personal title.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Active publication record and team breeding indicate continuity.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public institutional profile; verify active licenses cultivar by cultivar.

profiles.ownershipType: public researcher with fragmented commercial rights chain
profiles.ownershipSummary: Mingzhang Li is a Sichuan public-institution researcher; HFY01 and HFR18 records point to different commercial entities and title chains.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Senior researcher with active work and succession exposure.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Do not assign personal title. Resolve territorial ownership conflicts, company parentage, and current licenses.

profiles.ownershipType: private founder-led propagation and breeding company
profiles.ownershipSummary: James A. Heilig founded and operates Huron Plant Technologies; historical Driscoll work remains Driscoll-owned.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Highly founder-dependent early-stage specialist with no visible successor.
profiles.candidateParentBasis: Current founder affiliation only; the records in this profile include historical Driscoll breeding work and are not evidence that Huron owns those rights.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Founder-led target. Verify cap table, client contracts, current owned IP, and assignment boundaries.

profiles.ownershipSummary: Oregon State University hazelnut-program specialist; OSU manages licensing and IP.
profiles.leadershipSummary: More than four decades of tenure create eventual transition exposure, mitigated by the university team.
profiles.webResearchNotes: Public university licensing relationship; not an acquisition target.

profiles.ownershipType: public researcher linked to private grower consortium
profiles.ownershipSummary: IMIDA table-grape leader and breeder; ITUM is assignee for cited varieties and is a private grower-owned consortium.
profiles.leadershipSummary: Consortium and team structure reduce personal succession risk.
profiles.webResearchNotes: ITUM is a private consortium and licensing target; verify cap table, transfer restrictions, licenses, and IMIDA economics.
